mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (user_id, password, name, email, phone, rental_notice_email_enabled) VALUES (#{userId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{rentalNoticeEmailEnabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET password = #{password}, name = #{name}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, rental_notice_email_enabled = #{rentalNoticeEmailEnabled} WHERE user_id = #{userId}
